creator: ady@warpnet.ro
text:
Hi,

  Please do not commit this patch in this form, the shared library
versioning (probably) needs changing. Please allow me a few hours to build
a proper patchkit.

  Thanks for the help & the reminder!
  Ady (@freebsd.ady.ro)
  (maintainer of mail/imap-uw & mail/pine4)
